Solido/awesome-flutter

Platforms  1 month ago  43.2k
An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Flutter is Google’s UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. If you appreciate the content 📖, support projects visibility, give 👍| ⭐| 👏

Demonstrations

Instant Chat Integration

with Stream!

Contents

  • Articles
  • Videos
  • Components
  • Navigation
  • Template
  • Plugins
  • Frameworks
  • Experimental
  • Open Source Apps
  • Web
  • Utilities
  • Books
  • Bonus
  • Community

Articles

Introduction

  • Google IO 2018 - Building beautiful, flexible user interfaces.
  • Presentation - by Helio S. Junior.
  • Flutter Web - Ins and Outs of Flutter Web by Nash.

Websites / Blogs

  • Welcome to Flutter - English and French blog dedicated to providing practical solutions to most asked questions about Flutter by Didier Boelens.
  • SZAŁKO-BLOG - Step by step advanced design by Marcin Szalek.
  • Flutter by Example - Tutorials based on Redux, Firebase, Custom Animations, and UI.
  • Flutter Institute - Very original content and tutorials by Brian Armstrong.
  • Iirokrankka.com - Articles and tutorials and anything related by Iiro Krankka.
  • Norbert - In depth articles, features and app creation by Norbert515.
  • Flutter Tips - Articles, tips & tricks in the development by Diego Velásquez.
  • FilledStacks - Tutorials and guides on development by Dane Mackier.
  • Awesome Flutter tipsstars2.8k - Tips to help developers increase productivity by erluxman.

Tutorial

  • Animated Chat - Building beautiful UIs by Google Code Labs.
  • Firebase Chat - Firebase integration by Google Code Labs.
  • Planets-Flutter: from design to app - Detailed planets design tutorial.
  • Todo Liststars282 [259⭐] – Step by step tutorial how to build Todo List with Flutter by Andrei Lesnitsky
  • Flutter and Dart development - Articles and tutorials by Suragch.

Beginner

  • Roadmap to Flutter Developmentstars4.1k [2795⭐] - Visual roadmap with principles, patterns, and frameworks for Flutter newbies by Olexandr Leuschenko.
  • Layout Cheat Sheet - Extensive examples of layout widgets by Tomek Polański.
  • Getting Started with Flutter - by raywenderlich.com.
  • Beginner's Guidestars220 [123⭐] - Comprehensive guide to the basics of Flutter and Firebase by Anthony.

Intermediate

  • Flutter state management for minimalists - Understanding app architecture without relying on third-party frameworks by Suragch. See also State Management.

Advanced

  • Rendering Pipeline [799👍] and Let's build a render tree - Engine architecture by Adam Barth.
  • Render Objects - What are Widgets, RenderObjects and Elements? by Norbert515.
  • Streams and RxDart - Skillmatters presentation by Brian Egan.
  • Gesture System - Flutter Deep Dive: Gestures by Nash.
  • Schemas - Widget, State, Context and InheritedWidget explanations by Didier Boelens.
  • Rendering Engine Tutorial - Flutter's Rendering Engine: A Tutorial by AbdulRahman AlHamali.
  • Inherited Widget - Flutter’s InheritedWidget to hold app state by Chema Molins.
  • From Mobile to Desktop - Building applications for smartphones and desktops by Marcelo Henrique Neppel.
  • Accessibility widgets - Deep dive information about all aspects of accessibility by Muhammed Salih Güler.
  • Profiling w/ Timeline - Using the Timeline allows you to find and address specific performance issues in your application by Chinmay Garde.

Howtos

  • Parallax Effect - Parallax & non linear animation by Marcin Szalek.
  • Build Flavor - Define build configurations and switch them by Salvatore Giordano.
  • Build Flavor - Easily build flavors in Flutter (Android and iOS) with flutter_flavorizr by Angelo Cassano.

Videos

  • Boring Show - Exploration with the Flutter Team.
  • Tensor Programming [86🎬] - Very rich content by Tensor Programming.
  • Mtechviral [245🎬] - [Hindi/English] Mtechviral Series By Pawan Kumar.
  • Flutter in Practice - Free video courssd for beginners & non-programmers by Zaiste.
  • Whatsupcoders [82🎬] - Free video series on Flutter Widgets by Kamal.
  • Reso Coder - Intermediate and advanced videos by Matej Rešetár.

Components

Demonstrations

  • Official Gallerystars4.5k - Demo for the material design widgets provided by Flutter Team.
  • Flutter Examplesstars6.2k [5861⭐] - Simple basic isolated apps for devs by Nishant Srivastava.
  • Flutter Catalogstars1.8k [1601⭐] - showcasing Flutter components, with side-by-side source code view, by X-Wei.
  • Generative Artstars438 [401⭐] - Generative Art by Robert Felker.

UI

  • StaggeredGridViewstars2.7k [2292⭐] - GridView with tiles of variable sizes by Romain Rastel.
  • Radial Menustars426 [401⭐] - Animated Radial Menu by Victor Choueiri.
  • Tinder Cardsstars700 [646⭐] - Tinder like cards swipe effect by Ivascu Adrian.
  • Flip Panelstars530 [461⭐] - Flip panel with built-in animation by HungHD.
  • Facebook Reactionsstars300 [261⭐] - Facebook reactions widget by Duy Tran.
  • Flushbarstars881 [818⭐] - Highly configurable Snackbar by Andre Haueisen.
  • Stepper Touchstars261 [238⭐] - Lateral value stepper nicely animated by Raouf Rahiche.
  • Typeaheadstars642 [560⭐] - Display overlay suggestions to users as they type by Abdul Rahman Al Hamali.
  • Snapliststars404 [366⭐] - Create snappable list views by David Leibovych.
  • Pin Codestars295 [252⭐] - Animated & customisable Pin code for login and OTP by Liew Jun Tung.
  • Folding Cellstars503 [430⭐] - Fold your widget by Faob.
  • Liquid Pull To Refreshstars1k [922⭐] - A beautiful and custom refresh indicator by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Slide Container Slide vertically and horizontally with a smooth dampened motion by Quentin Le Guennec.
  • Direct Selectstars558 - Selection widget with an ethereal, full-screen modal popup by Ivan Yatsouba.
  • Before Afterstars716 [580⭐] - Beautiful slider which makes it easier to display the difference between two images, by Sahil Kumar.
  • Scratcherstars384 [306⭐] - Scratch card widget which temporarily hides content from user, by Kamil Rykowski.
  • Image Sequence Animatorstars129 [104⭐] - A simple widget for animating a set of images with full custom controls as an alternative to using a GIF file by Ali Yigit Bireroglu.
  • Beautiful_Popupstars546 [452⭐] - Beautify your app popup by jaweii.
  • Credit Card Formstars403 [317⭐] - Animated credit card input form Origogi.
  • Animated Selection Slidestars337 An animated selection widget by swiping by Sezgin Bilgetay.
  • Flutter Tagsstars402 [332⭐] - Tags with different customizations by Di Natale Antonino.
  • Flutter Neumorphicstars1.6k [1329⭐] - Ready to use Neumorphic kit for Flutter with 🕶️ dark mode.
  • Doughstars517 [388⭐] - Widgets for a squishy user interface by Josiah Saunders.
  • Card Settingsstars430 [356⭐] - package for building settings forms by codegrue.
  • Timelinesstars543 [413⭐] - Powerful & Easy to use timeline package by Chulwoo Park.
  • Timeline Tilestars528 [446⭐] - A tile to help build beautiful and customisable timelines by Julio Bitencourt.
  • Rounded Loading Buttonstars204 [127⭐] - Button with a loading indicator, complete with success and error animations by Chris Edgington.
  • PlutoGridstars388 [182⭐] - Web and desktop datagrid that can be controlled by the keyboard by bosskmk.

Sticky Headers

  • Sticky Infinite Liststars288 [234⭐] - Highly configurable multi directional infinite list with Sticky Headers by TatsuUkraine.
  • Sticky Headerstars753 [666⭐] - Sliver based sticky headers by Romain Rastel.
  • Sticky Headersstars875 [731⭐] - Configurable sticky headers by Simon Lightfoot.

Drawers

  • Hidden Drawer Menustars286 [231⭐] - Beautiful drawer mode menu feature with perspective animations by Rafael Almeida Barbosa.
  • Flutter Inner Drawerstars434 [385⭐] - Easy way to create an internal drawer (left / right) where you can enter a list-menu or other by Di Natale Antonino.

Bottom bars

  • Fancy Bottom Navigationstars608 [545⭐] - Animated bottom navigation by Tony Owen.
  • Circular Bottom Navigationstars510 [439⭐] - Beautiful animated bottom navigation bar by Iman Khoshabi.
  • Bottom Navy Barstars853 [775⭐] - Beautiful and colorful animated bottom navigation bar by Pedro Massango.
  • Titled Navigation Barstars322 [291⭐] - Animated bottom navigation bar that switch between icon and title by Pedro Massango.
  • Google Nav Barstars520 [409⭐] - A modern google style nav bar for flutter by Sooxt98.

Bottom Sheets

  • Rubber Bottom Sheetstars472 [418⭐] - Elastic material bottom sheet by Mattia Crovero.
  • Modal Bottom Sheetstars1.4k [1082⭐] - Modal bottom sheet with Material, Cupertino iOS13 or custom appareance by Jaime Blasco.

Sliders

  • RangeSliderstars353 [318⭐] - 2-thumb configurable RangeSlider by Didier Boelens.
  • Fluid Sliderstars305 [262⭐] - A slider with a minimal design and fluid like animation by Vamsi Krishna.
  • Flutter Xliderstars391 [336⭐] - A material design slider and range slider, horizontal and vertical, with RTL support by Ali-Azmoud.

UI Helpers

  • Reorderablesstars542 [442⭐] - Drag&Drop Table, Row, Column, Wrap(Grid) and SliverList elements by Hansheng Chiu.
  • Liquid Pull To Refreshstars1k [922⭐] - A beautiful and custom refresh indicator by Ayush Agarwal.
  • Infinite Listviewstars245 [206⭐] - Infinite scroll in both directions by Simon Lightfoot.
  • Offlinestars827 [742⭐] - Tidy utility to handle offline/online connectivity by Jeremiah Ogbomo.
  • Scroll To Indexstars403 [332⭐] - Scroll to specified child element with given index for SliverList/ListView by Jerry Chen.
  • In View Notifier Liststars496 - ListView that notify when widgets are on screen within a provided area by Vamsi Krishna.
  • ShowCaseViewstars1.1k [687⭐] - Way to showcase your app features on iOS and Android by Simform.

Material Design

  • Unicorn Speed Dialstars327 [300⭐] - Floating Action Button with Speed Dial by Tiago Martins.
  • Slidablestars2.3k [2008⭐] - Slidable list item with left and right slide actions by Romain Rastel.

Cupertino Design

  • Peek & Popstars222 [188⭐] - Peek & Pop implementation based on the iOS functionality by Ali Yigit Bireroglu.

Effect

  • Frosted Glass - Render effect by Collin Jackson.
  • Parallaxstars797 [735⭐] - ViewPager by Iiro Krankka.
  • Shimmerstars1.5k [1387⭐] - Shimmer effect while content is loading by HungHD.
  • Wavestars858 [742⭐] - Displaying some waves with custom color, duration, floating and blur effects by RockerFlower.
  • Liquid Swipestars971 - Liquid swipe to your stacked containers by Sahdeep Singh.
  • PhotoFiltersstars333 [297⭐] - Apply filters to an image by Sharafudheen KK.
  • Shinestars138 [137⭐] - Pretty shadows with dynamic light positions by Jonathan Monga.
  • Clay Containersstars411 [369⭐] - Neumorphic widget primitives to serve as the foundation of your own designs by Michael Charles.

Calendar

  • Calendar Widgetstars211 [162⭐] - Calendar widget by David Bennett.
  • Calendar Carousel Widgetstars741 - Calendar carousel by dooboolabstars741
  • Table Calendarstars1.4k [1167⭐] - Calendar organized neatly into a Table, with vertical autosizing by Aleksander Woźniak.
  • Time Plannerstars135 [66⭐] - A beautiful, easy to use and customizable time planner for flutter mobile, desktop and web by Mohammad Jamalianpour.

Login

  • Login Animationstars1.1k [1044⭐] - Smooth animation from login to home by Ruchika Gupta.
  • Flutter Loginstars1.2k - Login widget with slick animation from start to finish by NearHuscarl.

Backend-Driven

  • Dynamic Widgetstars1.3k [1100⭐] - Build your dynamic UI with json, and the json format is very similar with flutter widget code by Denny Deng.

Image

  • Carousel Sliderstars1.4k [1178⭐] - Carousel slider widget, support infinite scroll and custom child widget by serenader.
  • Parallax Imagestars270 [238⭐] - Image parallax by Anatoly Pulyaevskiy.
  • Photo Viewstars1.7k [1478⭐] - Scalable image view with loading placeholder by Renan C. Araújo.
  • SVGstars1.4k [1270⭐] - SVG parsing, rendering, and widget library by Dan Field.
  • Image Cropperstars877 [814⭐] - Crop your images support ratio, rotation, zoom by HungHD.
  • Cached Network Imagestars2.1k [1911⭐] - Show images from the internet and keep them in the cache directory by.
  • Lottiestars859 [665⭐] - Use airbnb's popular After Effects Animation library by xvrhstars859.
  • Bitmapstars150 [128⭐] - Perform Bitmap manipulations (such as contrast and exposure) with a help from the Dart FFI by Renan C. Araújo.
  • Cropstars209 [171⭐] - Crop any widget/image in Android, iOS, Web and Desktop by Mahdi K. Fard.

Image Picker

  • Image Picker - Images Selection by Collin Jackson.
  • WeChat Assets Pickerstars1.1k [811⭐] - Assets picker in WeChat style, support multi assets by Alex Li.

Map

  • Google Map Viewstars416 [415⭐] - Displaying google map plugin by AppTree Software.
  • GeoCoderstars174 [162⭐] - Forward and reverse geocoding by Aloïs Deniel.
  • Mapbox GLstars257 [251⭐] - Interactive, customizable vector maps by Mapbox.
  • AMapstars511 [504⭐] - Access to AMap services(高德地图) by fluttify-project.

Charts

  • Circular Chartstars380 [355⭐] - Animated radial and pie charts by Victor Choueiri.
  • Sparklinestars252 [245⭐] - Sparkline by Victor Choueiri.
  • Chartsstars2.8k [2505⭐] - By Google Charts Team.
  • Candlesticksstars396 [358⭐] - OHLC and Trade Volume Charts by Trent Piercy.
  • FChartsstars321 [321⭐] - Beautiful, responsive, animated charts by Keenan Thompson.
  • FL Chartstars5k [3846⭐] - Draw fantastic charts in Flutter by Iman Khoshabi.
  • Bezier Chartstars421 [401⭐] - Beautiful bezier line chart widget for flutter that is highly interactive and configurable by Diego Velasquez.
  • Echartsstars613 [533⭐] - Large collection of advanced reactives charts by LIN Chen.
  • Graphicstars787 [383⭐] - Data visualization library based on the Grammar of Graphics by LIN Chen.

Navigation

  • Flurostars3.5k [3362⭐] - The brightest, hippest, coolest router for Flutter with Navigation, wildcard, query, transitions by Posse.
  • PageView Indicatorstars158 [132⭐] - Build page indicators for the PageView by Leo Cavalcante.
  • Deep Link Navigationstars63 [53⭐] - Elegant abstraction for complete deep linking navigation in Flutter by Dennis Krasnov.
  • Getstars7.6k [5499⭐] - Navigate between screens & display snackbars/dialogs/bottomSheets without context by Jonny Borges.
  • Beamerstars458 [290⭐] - Route through guarded page stacks and URLs using the Navigator 2.0 API effortlessly by Sandro Lovnički.

Auth

  • Local Auth - Touch ID, lock code, fingerprint auth on iOS and Android.
  • Loginstars668 [628⭐] - FaceID, TouchID, and Fingerprint Reader by Rody Davis.
  • Google Sign-In - Google OAuth.
  • Firebase Auth - Firebase OAuth.
  • Facebook Loginstars403 [399⭐] - Authenticate with native Android & iOS Facebook login SDKs by Iiro Krankka.
  • Apple Sign-Instars159 [157⭐] - Apple sign in by Tom Gilder.
  • OAuthstars172 [170⭐] - Buffer, Strava, Unsplash, Github OAuth by Joe Birch.
  • Firebase Phone Auth - Phone number auth via SMS by Gildásio Filho.
  • SimpleAuthstars337 [314⭐] - Azure Active Directory, Amazon, Dropbox, Facebook, Github, Google, Instagram, Linked In, Microsoft Live Connect, Github, OAuth, Basic Auth by James Clancey.
  • Flutter AppAuthstars220 [176⭐] - Plugin that provides a wrapper around the AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs by Michael Bui.

Text & Rich Content

  • Markdown null - Markdown renderer for Flutter. It supports the original format, but no inline html.
  • Masked Textstars260 [244⭐] - Masked text with custom and monetary formatting by Ben-hur Santos Ott.
  • Zefyrstars2.1k [2016⭐] - Soft & gentle rich text editor by Memspacestars2.1k.
  • AutoSizeTextstars1.7k [1496⭐] - Automatically resizes text to fit perfectly within its bounds by Simon Leier.
  • Parsed Textstars210 [190⭐] - Interactive text based on content recognition, also supports Regex by Fayeed Pawaskar.
  • TeXstars216 [186⭐] - Render Mathematics Equations with full HTML and JavaScript support by Shahzad Akram.
  • Code Fieldstars148 - Customizable code field widget supporting syntax highlighting by Bertrand Bevillard.

Forms

  • Form Builderstars1.2k [935⭐] - Framework that simplifies building forms, validating fields, reacting to changes, and collecting the final user input by Danvick Miller.
  • Reactive Formsstars326 [233⭐] - Model-driven approach to handling Forms inputs and validations, heavily inspired in Angular's Reactive Forms.

Analytics

  • Usagestars137 [123⭐] - Google Analytics wrapper for command-line, web, and Flutter apps.
  • Firebase Analytics - Connect to Firebase Analytics API.
  • Pure Mixpanelstars24 [21⭐] - Analytics for the popular Mixpanel.com Nick Manning.

Internationalization

  • GenLangstars93 [88⭐] - Code generator for Internationalization by King Wu.
  • Flutter Translatestars322 [279⭐] - Internationalization (i18n) library by Florin Bratan.
  • attranslatestars267 - Semi-automated translation of ARB or JSON files by fkirc.

Styling

  • Flutterialstars1.7k [1437⭐] - Flutter Material Theme explorer by Erick Ghaumez.
  • Pigmentstars202 [184⭐] - Simple but useful package for use colors in flutter.

Media

Audio

  • Flutter Audio Recorderstars105 - Provides full controls and access to recording details such as level metering by Wenyan Li.
  • Audio Recorderstars171 [169⭐] - Record audio and store it locally by Jordan Alcaraz.
  • Flutter Soundstars751 [666⭐] - Flutter audio recorder and player at one hand by dooboolab.
  • AssetsAudioPlayerstars642 [567⭐] Simultaneous playback of audio from assets/network/file and displaying notifications [android / ios / web / macos]
  • Audio Service - System background audio support by Ryan Heise. Tutorial by Suragch.

Video

  • WebRTCstars3.3k [2747⭐] - WebRTC plugin for iOS/Android by CloudWebRtc.
  • Chewiestars1.6k [1353⭐] - Provides low-level access to video playback by Brian Egan.
  • Video Trimmerstars334 [276⭐] - Visualise and trim videos by Souvik Biswas.

Preferences

Monetization

  • Facebook Audience Networkstars148 - Facebook Audience Network Ad plugin that shows banner, interstitial, in-stream video, rewarded video & natvie ads by Dreamsoft Innovations.

  • Flutter Samplesstars2.7k [2464⭐] - Collection of nice flutter samples by Diego Velásquez.
  • ActingWeb First_Appstars366 [285⭐] - Starter app with basic elements for a team-developed production-quality app by Greger Wedel.

Simon Binder](https://github.com/simolus3)

Services

Frameworks

State management

Standard

  • Blocstars9.7k [8181⭐] - Collection of packages that help implement the BLoC design pattern by Felix Angelov.
  • MobXstars2.2k [2037⭐] - Supercharge the state-management in your apps with Transparent Functional Reactive Programming (TFRP). Port of MobX from the Js/React land.
  • Providerstars4.5k [3974⭐] - State-management library for Flutter by Remi Rousselet.
  • RiverPodstars3.6k [2214⭐] - Provider, but different by Remi Rousselet.
  • GetXstars7.6k - Contextless, State-management & navigation by Jonny Borges.
  • Binderstars171 [167⭐] - A lightweight, yet powerful way to bind your application state with your business logic, by Romain Rastel.

Redux / ELM / Dependency Injection

  • Built reduxstars81 [81⭐] - Automatic subscribing to your redux stores. Based on the built pattern by David Marne.
  • Redux.dartstars501 [486⭐] - Port of Redux to Dart with an ecosystem of middleware, Flutter integrations, and time traveling dev tools by John Ryan and Brian Egan.
  • Reduxstars1.6k [1522⭐] - Built to work with redux.dartstars501, utilities that allow you to easily consume a Redux Store to build Widgets.
  • Injectstars861 [847⭐] - Compile-time dependency injection by Google.
  • Fluxstars372 [368⭐] - Implementation of the Flux framework by Google.
  • Fishstars7.3k [7214⭐] - Alibaba Redux implementation.
  • Async Redux [199⭐] - Redux without boilerplate. Allows for both sync and async reducers by Marcelo Glasberg.

Widgets

  • Hooksstars2.5k [1965⭐] - Advanced code sharing between widgets by Remi Rousselet.
  • Functional widgetstars515 [435⭐] - Code generator writing widgets as functions with annotations by Remi Rousselet.

Data

  • Graphqlstars3k [2796⭐] - Implementation of the GraphQL spec by Zino App B.V..
  • GeoFlutterFirestars276 [244⭐] - Implementation of GeoFirestore for flutter by Darshan Gowda.
  • Ferrystars454 [334⭐] - Powerful & Extensible GraphQL Client by Sat Mandir Khalsa.

Backend

  • Dynamic Widgetstars1.3k [1100⭐] - Build your dynamic UI with json, and the json format is very similar with flutter widget code by Denny Deng.
  • NETCoreSyncstars64 - Centralized database synchronization framework for multiple clients, built on top of Moorstars1.7k library by Aldy J.
  • Parse for Flutter [394⭐] - Open source backend framework by ParsePlatform.

Animation

  • Sequence Animationstars378 [338⭐] - Composite staggered animations by Norbert Kozsir.

  • Drawing Animationstars435 [384⭐] - Create drawing line animations based on SVG path data by Carl Hauck.
  • Simple Animationsstars848 - Create awesome custom animations easily by Felix Blaschke.
  • Flutter-animation-setstars272 [264⭐] - Easy to build an animation set by efoxTeam.
  • Staggered Animationsstars1.2k [977⭐] - Easily add staggered animations to your ListView, GridView, Column and Row by mobiten.
  • Animate Do - Animation package inspired in Animate.css by Fernando Herrera.
  • Funvasstars456 [361⭐] - Create fun time based canvas animations by creativecreatorormaybenot.

Web

Experimental

Utilities
